sprint_window: 2026-06-20 → 2026-07-03 (14 days; starts day after Sprint 2 P1 ship 2026-06-19)
mvp_target: MVP-1 close-out + deploy automation (owner directive via Issue #127 / ADR-0027) — closes the prod-liveness gap exposed by Sprint 2 merge
sprint_source: #68 (Sprint 2 PM Kickoff — also covered Sprint 3 forward-look) + #127 (owner directive: auto-deploy) + ADR-0027 (deploy architecture, Accepted via PR #128 2026-06-19T18:41:26Z)
plan_source_pending: docs/sprints/sprint-03/plan.md (to be filed by orchestrator after sizing ceremony)
grooming_notes: PM-authored feature/infrastructure stories for Sprint 3. Driven by owner directive (Issue #127) and the prod-liveness regression discovered when Sprint 2 P1 stories merged to main but did not auto-deploy. Per ADR-0027 (Accepted), deploy is split into 3 sub-stories (DEPLOY-001/002/003) plus 1 optional audit query (DEPLOY-004). All 3 must-have stories depend on owner gate events (workflow-file merge approval, SSH key generation). Sprint 3 capacity is intentionally light on features — Sprint 2 P1 already shipped all MVP-1 features; Sprint 3 is operational hardening + infra + retro ceremony.

stories.title: Trigger pipeline (.github/workflows/deploy.yml + scripts/deploy-runner.sh)
depends_on: DEPLOY-002 (secrets must exist before workflow can reference them)
blocks: Sprint 3+ feature work (any change to main without auto-deploy re-creates the prod-liveness gap)
vision_metrics: M2 (stickiness — prod is live for owner's daily use)
M4 (skin persistence — must reach prod to validate cross-device clause)
adr_refs: ADR-0027 §Decision.1 (Trigger topology — GitHub Action on push to main)
stories.design_open_question: appleboy/ssh-action vs direct ssh command in Action — owner preference (flagged in ADR-0027 §Open questions). PM recommends appleboy/ssh-action (cleaner step model, well-maintained).
stories.owner_gate: Workflow file approval — per CLAUDE.md §File ownership matrix, .github/workflows/ is human-only. Owner must approve the workflow-file merge.
scope_includes: Create .github/workflows/deploy.yml per ADR-0027 §Decision.1+2
Create scripts/deploy-runner.sh (referenced by ADR-0027 but doesn't exist yet) — minimal local-runnable wrapper for parity with codex-runner.sh pattern
Pin appleboy/ssh-action by SHA per ADR-0027 §Threat model (supply chain)
Add Idempotency-Key header convention to workflow YAML comments (cross-link ADR-0019)
README.md update — document the deploy pipeline in 'What's where' section
out_of_scope: Multi-branch deploy (staging) — per ADR-0027 §Open questions, only main for now
Self-hosted GH runner — explicitly rejected in ADR-0027 §Rationale
stories.issue_pending: PM to open at Sprint 3 kickoff (after this PM PR merges)
stories.sprint_story_doc_pending: docs/backlog/DEPLOY-001.md (PM to draft after this PM PR)

stories.title: Secret wiring (DEPLOY_SSH_KEY + DEPLOY_HOST + DEPLOY_USER repo secrets)
blocks: DEPLOY-001 (workflow references the secrets — without secrets, workflow fails)
adr_refs: ADR-0027 §Decision.2 (Auth — SSH key in repo secret)
stories.owner_gate: Owner generates ed25519 keypair on prod host (192.168.1.199). Owner adds public key to ~/.ssh/authorized_keys. Owner stores private key in repo secret DEPLOY_SSH_KEY via gh CLI (manual, owner-only).
scope_includes: Owner generates ed25519 keypair on prod host (no passphrase per ADR-0027)
Owner adds public key to ~/.ssh/authorized_keys on prod host
Owner stores private key in repo secret DEPLOY_SSH_KEY
Owner stores DEPLOY_HOST=192.168.1.199 (overridable) + DEPLOY_USER=atilcan in repo secrets
DEPLOY-001 workflow references these 3 secrets
Document the secret rotation procedure in docs/ops/secret-rotation.md (new file, owner-maintained per ADR-0027 §Decision.4)
out_of_scope: Automated secret rotation (per ADR-0027 §Negative — manual quarterly rotation)
Key escrow / HSM — overkill for single-VM self-hosted
stories.issue_pending: PM to open at Sprint 3 kickoff
stories.sprint_story_doc_pending: docs/backlog/DEPLOY-002.md (PM to draft after this PM PR)

stories.title: GET /healthz + smoke test + auto-rollback
depends_on: ADR-0019 §HTTP API contract (Accepted — new endpoint extends the API surface)
DEPLOY-001 (smoke test runs in the workflow)
blocks: Sprint 3+ production hardening (no auto-rollback = regressions stay live)
vision_metrics: M2 (lower friction — owner trusts auto-deploy because rollback is automatic)
adr_refs: ADR-0027 §Decision.3 (Smoke test + rollback — GET /healthz with git_sha)
ADR-0019 §Decimal serialization (healthz response shape — must be JSON, not Decimal)
scope_includes: New endpoint: GET /healthz → {status: 'ok', git_sha: '<sha>', ts: '<iso>'} on 200; {status: 'error', ...} on 503
git_sha introspection — subprocess git rev-parse HEAD in src/atilcalc/api/main.py
Contract test: tests/api/test_healthz.py — covers 200 happy path + 503 import-failure path
Post-deploy curl in workflow YAML: curl -fsS http://192.168.1.199:PORT/healthz
Auto-rollback step: on smoke-test failure, run git reset --hard HEAD@{1} + systemctl --user restart + retry healthz once
Owner-pager on second failure: scripts/notify.sh -l human via workflow step
Update ADR-0019 amendment (or new amendment ADR-0019-amend-3) to document the new endpoint
out_of_scope: Deep health check (engine eval 2+2 etc.) — per ADR-0027 §Open questions, keep it cheap (import + git_sha only)
stories.issue_pending: PM to open at Sprint 3 kickoff
stories.sprint_story_doc_pending: docs/backlog/DEPLOY-003.md (PM to draft after this PM PR)

stories.title: scripts/deploy-status.sh audit query (last deploy SHA, time, status)
depends_on: DEPLOY-003 (healthz endpoint available for live status check)
adr_refs: ADR-0027 §Decision.6 (Observability — deploy-marker file readable by scripts/deploy-status.sh)
scope_includes: scripts/deploy-status.sh — reads ~/.deploy-marker (written by workflow) + queries /healthz
Output: last deploy SHA, timestamp, status (ok/error), uptime since last deploy
Optional: --watch flag for tail mode (polls every 30s)
out_of_scope: Web UI for deploy status — owner can use the CLI
Slack/email notifications — owner can read /var/log/dev-studio/AtilCalculator/deploy.log directly

scope_includes: Update .claude/CLAUDE.md.tmpl with Sprint 2 learnings (verdict-by schema, atomic hand-off, queue-empty wake)

notes: Proposed scope = 13 SP (4 must-have DEPLOY stories @ 8 SP + 1 retro doc @ 1 SP + 1 template port @ 3 SP + 1 optional DEPLOY-004 @ 1 SP). Comfortable buffer for unplanned work + ceremony time + post-Sprint-2 bug fixes (24h burn-in active until 2026-06-20T18:33:04Z). Sprint 3 is operational hardening + infra, NOT feature work — Sprint 2 P1 already shipped all MVP-1 features (M1+M2+M3+M4+M5 from vision.md). Sprint 3 outcomes: (a) auto-deploy closes the prod-liveness gap, (b) Sprint 2 retro captures lessons for future sprints, (c) template port operationalizes Sprint 1+2 learnings. M2+M4+M5 metrics validation with real data (≥7 days post-launch) is an ongoing activity, not a story — owner self-reports via daily-use observation. After Sprint 3, the project can consider: (a) Sprint 4 polish (e.g., M4 WCAG audit, error toast variants), (b) Sprint 4+ P2 personas (vision §Personas P2 — if owner wants to expand beyond single-user).
